sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see the pattern! Clicking on the red target again:
1. The red vertical bar (rows 24-29) disappeared
2. The red part of the horizontal bar (rows 30-33, cols 12-17) was RESTORED!
So clicking on the red target toggles the red object between two positions:
- Position 1: Horizontal bar at rows 30-33, cols 12-17 (part of the gray+red+dark-red assembly)
- Position 2: Vertical bar at rows 24-29, cols 18-21
This is like a "move" operation - clicking on a target moves the matching colored object between positions.
Let me think about this game more carefully. It seems like:
- The left side has objects that can be moved between positions
- The right side has target shapes that indicate where objects should go
- Clicking on a target on the right moves the matching colored object on the left
But wait, the right side targets don't have white borders anymore. And the objects on the left are being moved around.
Let me reconsider. Maybe the game is:
1. The right side shows the FINAL configuration (what the left side should look like)
2. The left side has objects that need to be rearranged
3. Clicking on a target on the right moves the matching colored object to the correct position
Looking at the right side:
- Red shape: A cross/plus shape
- Blue shape: Same cross/plus shape
Looking at the left side:
- The objects need to be rearranged to match the right side shapes
But the left side has multiple objects (gray boxes, colored squares, bars) that don't seem to match the right side shapes directly.
Let me try a different approach. Maybe I should try using arrow keys to navigate or move objects. Or maybe I should try clicking on the left side objects to see if they move.
Actually, let me look at the initial state again. The left side had:
1. A gray 6x6 box with yellow 2x2 inside (top-right)
2. A blue 4x4 square (middle-left)
3. A gray 4x4 + red 4x6 + dark red 4x4 horizontal bar (middle)
4. A checkerboard pattern (below the bar)
5. A gray 6x6 box with green 2x2 inside (bottom-left)
The right side had:
1. A red cross/plus shape with white border (top)
2. A blue cross/plus shape with white border (bottom)
After my actions:
- Clicking blue target: blue square was consumed, targets lost borders
- Clicking red target: red bar was moved to vertical position
- Clicking red target again: red bar was moved back to horizontal position
So the game seems to be about moving objects on the left to match the shapes on the right. The targets on the right show the final configuration.
Let me try clicking on the blue target again to see if it toggles the blue object.
